title: Golden Greek Lamb Wrap
description: A flavorful and aromatic Greek-inspired wrap packed with juicy lamb, crispy onions, and fragrant fines-herbes, all wrapped in a crispy ssam-wrap.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: boneless and trimmed of excess fat

ingredients.name: fines-herbes
ingredients.notes: chopped tarragon, chervil, chives, and parsley

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the finely chopped onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook for 5-6 minutes, until browned on all sides.
Add the lemon juice, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, until the lamb is cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the fines-herbes by chopping them finely and setting aside.
Warm the ssam-wraps in the oven or by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the lamb mixture onto the center of the ssam-wrap, followed by a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese and a handful of chopped fines-herbes.
Fold the bottom half of the ssam-wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
